product.name: ArMedi
product.specLine: 180 g/m², 75% Polyester 25% Viscose, Water and Oil Repellent 1/1 Plain Woven Fabric
descriptions: ArMedi is 75% polyester 25% Viscose medical wear fabric. With viscose content it provides extra confort for hospital and school workers. It is the most popular fabric for light uniforms usage.
It has water and oil repellent functions with provides extra usage time.
180 g/m², 75% Polyester 25% Viscose, Water and Oil Repellent 1/1 Plain Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>900N; Weft>700N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>25N; Weft>20N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Water and Oil Repellent | 4 | EN ISO 4920

evidence: descriptions: 'ArMedi is 75% polyester 25% Viscose medical wear fabric... for hospital and school workers... most popular fabric for light uniforms usage.'
matches.rationale: Product is explicitly categorized as a medical fabric, described for hospital use and labeled as Medical Uniform in application data.
